name: OBI/Microprice Consensus (Tightened, Opening)
hypothesis: The parent spec iter003_obi_micro_consensus_opening demonstrated that an opening session filter boosted profitability. This spec tightens the underlying imbalance signal thresholds (obi_1 > 0.6, microprice > 1.2) to isolate an even more select, higher-conviction subset of trades within this profitable regime.
formula: 1.0 if (obi_1 > 0.6 and microprice_dev_bps > 1.2 and minute_of_session < 15) else 0.0
mutation_note: Tightened thresholds for obi_1 (0.5->0.6) and microprice_dev_bps (1.0->1.2) based on feedback recommendation to seek higher conviction.
